overview.summary: Model score 8 vs user score 6 (gap 2). Primary drivers: Session Duration, Location Stability. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Compensatory weighting from motion stability likely offset negative environmental signals more than appropriate.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Physiological indicators should be used as supporting evidence, not a dominant signal, when environmental noise is primary.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS is useful for confirming location stability; keep it as secondary context signal.

judgment_policy_next_run: Increase audio penalty when speech and moderate-to-high ambient noise co-occur.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
